lines.speaker: Swamp Priest
lines.text: Yessss, adventurer?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You smell funky.

lines.speaker: Swamp Priest
lines.text: As do you, adventurer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How come you live with the lizardmen?

lines.speaker: Swamp Priest
lines.text: They are my sssaviours, I owe them my life.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What did they save you from? Is it to do with your eye?

lines.speaker: Swamp Priest
lines.text: Why, yesss it isss... Many yearsss ago now. 30? 40? I've lost count.

lines.speaker: Swamp Priest
lines.text: I wasss a Captain of the Shayzien Army, Captain Reynard Koil, ssstationed up on Shayziens' wall.

lines.speaker: Swamp Priest
lines.text: We were told to attack the lizardmen, for they were apparently attacking usss. I led the charge.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Apparently? Were they attacking?

lines.speaker: Swamp Priest
lines.text: Alasss, I took an arrow to the eye and missed the battle. I woke up here, worried for my life.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The lizardmen took you prisoner?

lines.speaker: Swamp Priest
lines.text: At first, that isss what I thought, but they tended my woundsss and fed me well.

lines.speaker: Swamp Priest
lines.text: I assssumed my people would come for me once they sssaw my body wasn't amongssst the dead, but they never did.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Would the lizardmen let you leave?

lines.speaker: Swamp Priest
lines.text: Oh yesss, once my ssstrength returned, I went and ssspoke to the Shayzien Army.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ...And?

lines.speaker: Swamp Priest
lines.text: They thought I wasss a lizardman and fired arrowsss at me, ssso I returned here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is that you're wearing?

lines.speaker: Swamp Priest
lines.text: I found these in thisss shrine. I guesss they belonged to sssome long dead priest.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What would a priest be doing in this gross swamp?

lines.speaker: Swamp Priest
lines.text: This grossss ssswamp is my home. You sssure do ask a lot of questionsss, adventurer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is the symbol on the shrine?

lines.speaker: Swamp Priest
lines.text: You do not recognissse it, adventurer? It would ssseem hissstory is written by the winnersss, for that isss the sssymbol of the Great Lord Xeric.

lines.speaker: Swamp Priest
lines.text: Or at leassst, that isss what the lizardmen tell me...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye, swampy man.

lines.speaker: Swamp Priest
lines.text: Goodbye, adventurer.

sections.title: Using Kharedst's memoirs (with The fisher's flute included) on him

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you the 'Rey' this entry mentions?

lines.speaker: Swamp Priest
lines.text: Oh, that wasss a lifetime ago... Sssuch a wonderful little one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you've not seen her recently?

lines.speaker: Swamp Priest
lines.text: Lassst I heard, her mind had cracked. Her father died and...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And?

lines.speaker: Swamp Priest
lines.text: Gone.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, how mysterious.
